irrigation.frequency: Continuous flooding for first 30 days, then top up every 2-3 days
irrigation.critical_stages: Tillering, panicle initiation, flowering, grain filling
irrigation.tips: Maintain 5-10 cm water level. Drain field 10 days before harvest.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 50% K at planting
Tillering: 25% N at 20-25 days
Panicle initiation: 25% N, 50% K at 40-45 days
fertilizer.organic: FYM 10-12 tons/ha or compost 5 tons/ha as basal

irrigation.frequency: Every 7-10 days depending on soil type
irrigation.tips: Avoid waterlogging. Light irrigation during grain filling.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 100% K at sowing
Top dressing: 50% N at 30-35 days

irrigation.frequency: Every 7-10 days, more frequent during critical stages
irrigation.critical_stages: Knee-high stage, tasseling, silking, grain filling
irrigation.tips: Ensure adequate moisture from tasseling to grain filling.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 50% K at sowing
First top dressing: 25% N at 25-30 days
Second top dressing: 25% N, 50% K at 45-50 days

irrigation.tips: Drought tolerant but responds well to irrigation at critical stages.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 100% K at sowing
Top dressing: 50% N at 30 days

irrigation.tips: Highly drought tolerant. Avoid excess water.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 100% K at sowing
Top dressing: 50% N at 25-30 days

irrigation.frequency: Every 3-4 days in summer, 7-10 days in winter
irrigation.tips: High water requirement. Mulching helps retain moisture.

fertilizer.organic: FYM 20-25 kg/plant or vermicompost 5 kg/plant annually

irrigation.tips: Withhold water 2-3 months before flowering. Resume after fruit set.

application_schedule: May-June: 50% N, 100% P, 50% K
September-October: 50% N, 50% K

irrigation.frequency: Every 4-7 days in summer, 10-15 days in winter
irrigation.tips: Mulching with coconut leaves helps moisture retention.

application_schedule: Split into 2 doses: Pre-monsoon and post-monsoon
Apply in circular trenches 1.5-2 m from trunk
fertilizer.organic: Green manure in basin, 25 kg compost/palm annually

irrigation.frequency: Every 7-10 days, more frequent during fruiting
irrigation.tips: Reduce irrigation during flower bud formation.

application_schedule: Split into 3 doses: February, June, October
Apply in ring around the tree

irrigation.tips: Avoid waterlogging. Maintain consistent moisture.

application_schedule: Apply monthly from 2 months after planting
Increase dose during fruiting

irrigation.tips: Young plants need more frequent irrigation.

application_schedule: Split into 2-3 doses during growing season
Apply before flowering and during fruit development

irrigation.frequency: Every 3-5 days, more frequent during fruiting
irrigation.tips: Avoid water stress during flowering. Reduce before harvest.

application_schedule: Basal: 30% N, 100% P, 30% K at transplanting
First top dressing: 35% N, 35% K at 30 days
Second top dressing: 35% N, 35% K at 50 days

irrigation.frequency: Every 5-7 days, stop 10 days before harvest
irrigation.tips: Light frequent irrigation during bulb formation.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 50% K at planting
First top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 30 days
Second top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 45 days

irrigation.tips: Maintain consistent moisture throughout growing period.

application_schedule: Basal: 40% N, 100% P, 40% K at transplanting
First top dressing: 30% N, 30% K at 30 days
Second top dressing: 30% N, 30% K at 60 days

irrigation.tips: Light frequent irrigation for continuous tender growth.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 100% K at sowing
Top dressing: 50% N at 20 days
fertilizer.organic: FYM 10-12 tons/ha as basal, vermicompost for quick growth

irrigation.frequency: Every 5-7 days in summer, 10-12 days in winter
irrigation.tips: Consistent moisture needed for tender pods.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 50% K at sowing
First top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 30 days
Second top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 50 days

irrigation.tips: Avoid water stress during flowering.

application_schedule: Basal: 40% N, 100% P, 40% K at transplanting
First top dressing: 30% N, 30% K at 30 days
Second top dressing: 30% N, 30% K at 60 days

irrigation.tips: Drought tolerant but needs water during flowering.

application_schedule: Split into 2-3 doses during growing season
Apply before flowering

irrigation.tips: Avoid waterlogging. Critical during flowering.

application_schedule: Basal: 100% N, 100% P, 100% K at sowing
Rhizobium culture application recommended

irrigation.tips: Consistent moisture for quality heads.

application_schedule: Basal: 40% N, 100% P, 40% K at transplanting
First top dressing: 30% N, 30% K at 25 days
Second top dressing: 30% N, 30% K at 45 days

irrigation.tips: Light frequent irrigation for straight root development.

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 50% K at sowing
First top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 30 days
Second top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 50 days

irrigation.frequency: Every 7-10 days, more frequent in summer
irrigation.tips: High water requirement. Stop irrigation 15 days before harvest.

application_schedule: Basal: 25% N, 100% P, 25% K at planting
First top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 30 days

Third top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 90 days

application_schedule: Basal: 100% N, 100% P, 50% K at sowing
Top dressing: 50% K at 30 days
Gypsum: 400 kg/ha at flowering for calcium

irrigation.frequency: Every 7-10 days, stop 1 month before harvest
irrigation.tips: Mulching helps moisture retention.

application_schedule: Basal: 30% N, 100% P, 30% K at planting
First top dressing: 35% N, 35% K at 45 days
Second top dressing: 35% N, 35% K at 90 days

irrigation.tips: Stop irrigation at boll opening stage.

First top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 30 days
Second top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 60 days
Third top dressing: 25% N, 25% K at 90 days

application_schedule: Basal: 50% N, 100% P, 50% K at transplanting
Top dressing: 50% N, 50% K at 30 days

irrigation.tips: Consistent moisture for quality blooms.

application_schedule: Split into monthly applications during growing season
Increase during flowering

application_schedule: Split into 4-6 doses during growing season
Apply monthly during peak flowering

First top dressing: 30% N, 30% K at 30 days
